raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mannus Liffumnus buhs
jums turreht/ tew ne buhs taivus
Lohpus ar Lohpeim no zittas
Kabrtas likt sajankeees / tawu
Tihrumu tew ne buhs ar Dascha-
du Mistrn apfeht / un Drehbehm
no diwejada Auduma linna un
willaina ne buhs us tawu Meeſu
nahkt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad Wihrs pee kahdas
Seewas gulles / un to apgruh-
tina/ un ta weena Kalpone irr/kas
no ta Wihra apſmeeta un wiﬀai
ne atpireta irr / un winrai ne
kahda Atfwabbinaſchana dohta
irr/ teem buhs fchanſteem tapt /
bet mirt teem ne buhs / jo ta ne
irr fwabbada bijuti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winnam buhs favou
Noseedsibas- Uppuri tam KUN-
GAN peeneft/preeſſch tahs Sa-
eefchanas Telts Durwin/ weenu
Aunu par Noseedsibas - Up-
puri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tam Preesteram buhs
ar ta Noseedsibas- Uppura Au-
nu/preeſſch ta KUNGA par win-
xu Salihdsinaſchanu darriht
winna Grehkn deht / fo wiſsch
darrijs irr / tad notiſs winnam
fawn Grehku Peedohſchana / fo
wiſsch darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad jnhs arridsan tai
Semmē nahkfeet / un dehſtifeet
wiſſadus Rohkus par Barribu/
tad buhs jums* winnu Preeſſch-
Ahdu / winnu Auglus/ apgrai-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet zettorta Gadda buhe
wiſſeem winna Augteem fweh-
teem buht / par Teiffchannu tau
KUNGAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un veektā Gaddā buhe
jums winna Augkus ehft/tadeh-
ka winnu Augti preekſch juns
mairoiahs/Esefinit tas KUNGē
juhfu Deetws.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jums ne buhs ne ko a
Affini ehft/ jums ne buhs fiſleht
nedā leckus Laikus iſwehleht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jums ne buhs juhsas Gal
was Mattus apkahrt apgreest
nedā tawas Bahrdas Mattu
wiﬀai nodſiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jums ne buhs kahda Mir
rona deht ne kahdu Sihni juhsā
Mecfa eegreest/ nedā kahdu Ra-
stu weena Mehrka jums eespeest
Es efim tas KUNGē.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tew ne buhs tawu Mei
tu fagahniht winnu pee Manzi-
bas turredans / ka ta Seimm
Manzibu ne dsenn / un ka te
Seimne ar Blehdibu ne tohp pee
pildita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jums buhs mannas Du-
fefchanas-Deenas turreht / u
mannu fwehtu Weetu bihteē
Es efim tas KUNGē.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jums ne buhe greesteē pe
Sihlneefeim / nedā Baredseta-
jecin/ ne metſlejeet tohs/fagahni
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
